creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
> >Number:         15994
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       new libapreq 0.31 port

This port has a problem about BUILD_DEPENDS:

% cd /usr/ports/www/mod_perl 
% make
===>  mod_perl-1.21 is marked as broken: see PR 14924; use p5-Apache instead.

So I think you should change ${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_perl to p5-Apache.

S.TAOKA
